ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(b:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),

    p2 = (a)-[r2:DIRECTED]->(c:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),

    p3 = (b)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(d:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver', tagline: 'You talkin’ to me?'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does Martin Scorsese’s directorial and acting roles in *Taxi Driver* influence the critical reception, as reflected in the review summary and rating for the film?

cypher: MATCH (p:Person {name: "Martin Scorsese"})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie {title: "Taxi Driver"})\nMATCH (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m)<-[:REVIEWED]-(r:Person)-[:REVIEWED]->(m)\nRETURN p, m, r, m.title AS movie, r.summary AS review_summary, r.rating AS review_rating
